summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Audit Log feature for AMLGuard. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Audit Log page loads correctly with table, filters, export buttons, and dark theme styling.
passed_tests: Backend: Login authentication (POST /api/auth/login)
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns logs with proper structure (timestamp, user_name, user_role, action_type, module, record_id, ip_address)
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs supports pagination (limit, skip)
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs filter by action_type
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs filter by module
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs filter by user_name
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs filter by date range (start_date, end_date)
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/filters returns distinct action_types, modules, users
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/export/csv returns valid CSV file with correct headers
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/export/pdf returns valid PDF file
Backend: CSV export respects filter parameters
Backend: Immutability - PUT /api/audit-logs/{id} returns 404 (no update endpoint)
Backend: Immutability - DELETE /api/audit-logs/{id} returns 404 (no delete endpoint)
Backend: Immutability - POST /api/audit-logs returns 405 (no manual creation)
Backend: Unauthenticated access denied (401)
Frontend: Audit Log page (/audit-logs) loads with full table
Frontend: Table shows all columns (Timestamp, User, Role, Action, Module, Record, IP)
Frontend: Filter by Action Type dropdown populated from backend
Frontend: Filter by User dropdown populated from backend
Frontend: Filter by Module dropdown populated from backend
Frontend: Filter by date range (From Date, To Date) works
Frontend: Clear All filters button works
Frontend: CSV export button downloads valid CSV file
Frontend: PDF export button downloads valid PDF file
Frontend: Dark theme styling matches #080c12 background
seed_data_creation: ~32 audit log entries exist from prior testing (case management, screening operations, and export tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Log feature fully tested. Backend has GET-only endpoints for audit logs (no PUT/DELETE/POST for modification - immutable by design). Filter dropdowns populated dynamically from /api/audit-logs/filters. Export endpoints use reportlab for PDF and csv module for CSV. ~32 audit entries exist. Email service and screening service remain MOCKED (console logging and random mock data respectively).

mocked_apis.screening_service.py: PEP, Sanctions, Adverse Media screening return random mock results
mocked_apis.email_service.py: Logs emails to console instead of sending

immutability_verification.post_endpoint: Returns 405 - No manual creation endpoint exists
immutability_verification.conclusion: Audit logs are append-only and immutable as designed
